rationale: This persona is excellent across all dimensions. It achieves max scores by combining complex, highly specific industry jargon (IaC, idempotent, GraphQL schema) with a rich, narrative backstory. All sections—from pains to goals to sample quotes—are perfectly aligned and highly visible in the source evidence, making it both deeply grounded and incredibly actionable. It reads like a detailed profile from a senior product architect, not a template.
